comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Primitives and helpers for constructing images to send (drawing primitives, regions, etc.).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing: Image construction is out of scope. This project focuses on getting images to the device. We will focus instead on: (1) animation framework for sending frames at the right times; (2) headless browser mechanism for dynamically generating frames from web content; (3) React components for that.
